creator: scf@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 259892
Update port and rebase to latest HEAD

I rebased the port to a recent HEAD.  In addition to the list of changes mentioned already:

- Update pkg-message with troubleshooting for display issues.
- Use GH_* options to fetch files for the NWMOVIES option.
- Disable xrandr by default to prevent the game from showing only a black screen.
- Tested against linux_base-rl9.
